title: Path traversal in file read
diff:
diff --git a/file_server.py b/file_server.py
--- a/file_server.py
+++ b/file_server.py
@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@ def read_file(filename):
-    safe_path = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, os.path.basename(filename))
+    # User can do ../../etc/passwd
+    safe_path = os.path.join(BASE_DIR, filename)
     with open(safe_path) as f:
         return f.read()

ground_truth.description: Path traversal: filename not sanitized, attacker can read arbitrary files
